idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Reviewer
idea-plugin.description:
Automatic PR/MR code reviews powered by Claude Code CLI, directly from your JetBrains IDE.

Uses the gstack two-pass review methodology — CRITICAL issues (SQL safety, race conditions, injection) block, INFORMATIONAL issues (dead code, test gaps, performance) are noted but non-blocking.

Features

  • Review Current PR — auto-detects your branch's open PR/MR and reviews it
  • Review by URL — paste any GitHub PR or GitLab MR URL to review
  • Streaming output — real-time review progress in a dedicated tool window
  • Inline comments — posts comments on exact lines where issues are found
  • Full repo context — clones and caches repos for deep, context-aware reviews
  • GitHub + GitLab — works with both platforms

Usage

Go to Tools → Review Current PR with Claude or Tools → Review PR by URL with Claude.

Requirements

  • Claude Code CLI installed
  • gh (GitHub CLI) or glab (GitLab CLI) authenticated
  • claude-code-reviewer CLI tool (auto-installs on first run)

GitHub | Report Issues
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Review Current PR — auto-detect and review your branch's PR/MR
  • Review by URL — review any GitHub PR or GitLab MR by URL
  • Streaming output in dedicated tool window
  • Auto-install of claude-code-reviewer CLI on first run
  • Compatible with GoLand, IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, and more

action.description: Detect current branch PR/MR and review with Claude

action.text: Review PR by URL with Claude
action.description: Enter a PR/MR URL to review with Claude
